'''Nopces Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Nopces system/Legends|Nopces system]] on the edge of the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]], near the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]].

{{Planet-stub}}
